subcodes.first_line: The Most Exalted Pen proclaimeth: All the world hath been created for the knowledge of the Ancient Lord, and hath been called forth from nothingness into being [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قلم اعلی میفرماید جمیع عالم لاجل عرفان مالک قدم خلق شده اند و از عدم بوجود
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @wisdom [hikmat], @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
